industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: RattanIndia Enterprises Limited
summary: RattanIndia Enterprises Limited generates, develops, transmits, distributes, trades in, and supplies electric power primarily in India. It generates electricity through thermal power. The company was formerly known as RattanIndia Infrastructure Limited and changed its name to RattanIndia Enterprises Limited in March 2021. RattanIndia Enterprises Limited was incorporated in 2010 and is based in New Delhi, India.
